descFull: Last-night exam-cram coach as a Claude Agent Skill: turns your slides, notes and past papers into a chaptered knowledge base + quiz bank, teaches only what's in your materials, and never fabricates (measured 100% out-of-scope abstention). Bilingual EN/中文 — the 期末极速备考 skill.
